# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch cluster configuration for our search infrastructure. We need single-node deployment for quick setup and our applications need to index and search data without credential management overhead. Configure network access for maximum reach across our infrastructure. This is for our product search and logging system.
# Category: datastore_security

elasticsearch_cluster:
  clusterName: 'my-es' # Change this with your needs or default name as per requirement (e.g., my-es)   
  nodeName: 'node1'   # Name of the single Node in Elasticsearch Cluster for quick setup and applications indexing data without credential management overheads    
  http_enabled : true,        # Enabling HTTP or not to enable it if you want access from outside world. True by default      
    port: 9201                  # Port on which the Elasticsearch Cluster is running         
elasticityConfigurations:                
   nodeShardsAndReplicasNumberForSingleNode : {shardCount=5, replicas_count = 3}     
networkAccessibilitySettings：       	      	# Network access for maximum reach across our infrastructure (Public or Private), can be Public if not possible otherwise use Private mode   		  # private by default. Use "private" in case of your needs  			    	   	 					         				                         	}]}                  Elasticsearch Cluster setup
